case_title: DIAMOND, ALLAN B., AS CHAPTER 11 TRUSTEE OF HOWREY VS. ENERGY INCORPORATED NV, LLC, A NEVADA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ALLAN B. DIAMOND, AS CHAPTER 11 TRUSTEE OF HOWREY LLP'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT CONFIRMS THE ARBITRATION AWARD IN THE AMOUNT OF $824,005.80 PLUS ARBITRATION FEES AND EXPENSES IN THE AMOUNT OF $13,900, FOR A TOTAL AWARD OF $837,905.80, PLUS INTEREST THEREON AT THE RATE OF 10% PER ANNUM FROM THE DATE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND JUDGMENT) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER ALLAN B. DIAMOND, AS CHAPTER 11 TRUSTEE OF HOWREY LLP'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court confirms the arbitration award in the amount of $824,005.80 plus arbitration fees and expenses in the amount of $13,900, for a total award of $837,905.80, plus interest thereon at the rate of 10% per annum from the date of entry of judgment. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and judgment) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
